ideation: This animation sequence portrays a construction worker's confident and focused posture.  It begins with arms at the sides, transitions to a hand-on-hip stance, and ends with arms crossed, conveying determination. The left arm will primarily be used to represent the tool-holding and work-related actions. The right arm will remain mostly passive, except for the crossing motion.  The movements should be deliberate and purposeful, reflecting the seriousness and skill of a construction worker. Frame 1: Arms relaxed at sides, ready for action. Frame 2: Left arm moves to hip, right arm remains neutral. Frame 3: Left arm adjusts slightly on hip, right arm begins to cross over. Frame 4: Arms firmly crossed over chest, showing confidence and focus.

frames.beat: arms rest at sides, ready for work
left arm moves to hip, right arm stays put
left hand on hip, right arm begins to cross
arms crossed firmly, confident and focused
